name: SP8192 BPE + JEPA-Style Distillation (8xH100)
blurb: SP8192 BPE non-record run on 8xH100 with GPTQ int8+zstd export, packaged with a JEPA-style distillation implementation for autoregressive models: EMA-teacher latent targets over looped mid-depth states, gated residual integration of predicted representations, and a coupled CE+distill+JEPA objective designed for stable post-quant roundtrip behavior under the 16MB cap.
author: Dex Hunter
